extension.description: Orion v3.2.0 - Complete media addon with multiple torrent scrapers (Torrentio, MediaFusion, Jackettio, Orionoid), Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox, Trakt integration with scrobbling, watchlists and liked lists, ResolveURL support, watch history, favorites, Kids Zone, and auto-play next episode.
extension.news: [3.2.0] Added TorBox debrid support with API key auth and cache checking. Fixed debrid providers - removed broken requests dependency, all providers now use native urllib for Kodi 21+ compatibility. Added TorBox to debrid priority settings.
